info.name: FinTrack
info.description:
FinTrack is a full-featured personal finance application integrated into Nextcloud.
**Features:** - Asset, Expense, Revenue and Liability accounts - Multi-currency support with custom conversion rates - Income and expense transaction tracking - Inter-account transfers with automatic currency conversion - Recurring transactions (daily, weekly, monthly, yearly) - Budget management with progress tracking - Categories and tags for transactions - Financial reports and analytics - External URL for remote transaction entry - JSON/CSV import and export - All data stored securely in your Nextcloud database
info.author: FinTrack
